data.description: A research report reveals that the Veterinary Ophthalmology Equipment Market based in DELRAY BEACH, Fla., is estimated to increase from approximately USD 0.54 billion in 2026 to USD 0.83 billion by 2031, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.7%. data.title: Farmer Bros's Earnings: A Preview
data.description: Farmer Bros (NASDAQ: FARM) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on Friday, February 13, 2026. Analysts are predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.11 for the company. Investors will be looking for Farmer Bros to exceed this estimate and provide a positive forecast for the next quarter. It's important to note that while earnings beats or misses can impact stock prices, guidance for future growth is also crucial. In the previous quarter, the company missed EPS expectations by $0.09. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Over 8,000 Albertans share health care horror stories, sparking campaign with 25,000 signatures in 3 weeks.
data.description: In Edmonton, Alberta, a movement advocating for a health care "State of Emergency" has gathered nearly 25,000 signatures within three weeks from an online petition. Additionally, over 8,000 narratives and remarks highlighting the deteriorating condition of the province's health system have been shared. Raj Uppal, the President of CUPE Alberta, unveiled a newly created website (www.stateofemergency.ca/stories) to display the entirety of the 8,000 comments collected by the union. Uppal expressed, "The reaction has been immense and poignant," emphasizing the passionate responses received from Albertans.

data.title: Hyatt and RLH Properties open Alila Mayakoba in Mexico, marking Alila brand's debut in Latin America and the Caribbean.
data.description: Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE:H) and RLH Properties have revealed the opening of Alila Mayakoba in Mexico's Riviera Maya, highlighting a significant step for the Alila brand worldwide as it launches in Latin America and the Caribbean with a fully realized resort concept. This luxury retreat, emphasizing nature and wellness, showcases Alila's distinctive hospitality philosophy, centered on the well-being of guests. The debut in this region marks a momentous occasion with Alila Mayakoba being one of the brand’s premier resort offerings.

data.title: AB InBev hits 52-week high post-resilient quarter, reports 4.8% revenue increase to $15.555B; EPS beats estimates at 95 cents. CEO credits strategy for growth, positive results.
data.description: AB InBev, the brewing giant, reported their Q4 and full-year 2025 results, with organic revenue growth of 2.5% in the quarter and 2.0% for the full year. They posted adjusted EPS of 95 cents, exceeding the 89-cent estimate. Quarterly sales were $15.555 billion, surpassing the expected $15.533 billion. Reported revenue rose 4.8% in Q4 to $15.555 billion but decreased 0.8% for the year to $59.32 billion due to currency impacts. AB InBev CEO, Michel Doukeris, highlighted executing their strategy effectively and entering 2026 strong. GAAP EPS was 99 cents in Q4 2025. Underlying EPS increased from 88 cents to 95 cents. The company mentioned consistent results despite varying conditions, emphasizing their durable strategy. AB InBev's portfolio includes popular brands like Budweiser, Bud Light, Stella Artois, and Corona, alongside craft labels and beverages like hard seltzers.

data.title: Innovative Solutions receives AWS MSP Partner status for high-level services to businesses on Feb 12, 2026.
data.description: In West Henrietta, New York on February 12, 2026, Innovative Solutions revealed that it has become the top Amazon Web Services (AWS) Premier Tier Services Partner. The company, known for providing AI and data services to expanding businesses, has achieved the prestigious title of AWS Managed Service Provider (MSP) Partner.

data.title: Cutting streaming & food delivery could save nearly $7,700/yr for down payment, helping renters buy home sooner.
data.description: Young renters in Columbia, Mo have the potential to save approximately $7,700 annually for a down payment by reallocating their discretionary spending habits. This can be achieved by cutting back on expenses related to services such as streaming, food delivery, and social activities. With this approach, individuals can significantly boost their savings towards purchasing a property.

data.title: ESSENCE honors Chase Infiniti, Kerry Washington, and others at the 19th Annual Black Women in Hollywood event, highlighting key women in entertainment.
data.description: In Los Angeles, ESSENCE has revealed the lineup for the 2026 Black Women in Hollywood ceremony. Chase Infiniti and prominent figures such as Kerry Washington and LaTanya Richardson Jackson will be honored during the event. The ceremony will also feature a Luminary Spotlight recognizing the women of 'SINNERS’ including Autumn Durald Arkapaw, Hannah Beachler, Jayme Lawson, Ruth E. Carter, Shunika Terry-Jennings, and Wunmi Mosaku. The event will take place on Thursday, March 12th at the Fairmont Century Pl, marking the beginning of entertainment’s major awards-season weekend.
